variables.description: Present when phase >= 2: COMPACT, referenced-only token table. Each variable is resolved to its default-mode `value` (+ `cssColor` for COLOR). Paints that bind a variable also carry a resolved `tokens` map at the paint.

rasters.description: Present when phase 3 + plugin raster option: map key -> base64. Key is a node id (PNG of a small root node) or an image hash (raw IMAGE-fill bytes). Fetch one on demand via the figma_bridge_get_raster MCP tool.

node.description: One serialized scene node. additionalProperties is true: fields are present only when meaningful for the node type/phase.

type.description: Figma node type, e.g. FRAME, TEXT, VECTOR, INSTANCE.

bbox.description: Bounding box. `space:absolute` = page coordinates (from absoluteBoundingBox). `space:relative` = parent-relative fallback (x/y of LayoutMixin). Never mix the two spaces.

rel.description: Parent-relative box (child absolute minus parent absolute) — CSS-ready left/top/width/height for absolutely-positioned children.

rectangleCornerRadii.description: [topLeft, topRight, bottomRight, bottomLeft] when corners differ.

fills.description: Paints. SOLID has color {r,g,b} 0..1 + `cssColor` (#hex/rgba, opacity folded in). GRADIENT_* has gradientStops[{position,color,cssColor}] + gradientTransform. IMAGE has imageHash (opaque, not a URL) + scaleMode. A paint that binds a variable also has `tokens` (field -> {id,name,collection,value,cssColor}).

effects.description: Shadows/blurs. At phase >= 2, shadows add color/cssColor/offset/radius/spread.

layout.description: Container auto-layout (FRAME/COMPONENT/INSTANCE): layoutMode, sizing modes, align, padding, itemSpacing, layoutWrap, layoutGrids, and `css` — a ready flexbox block (display/flexDirection/justifyContent/alignItems/gap/padding/flexWrap).

layoutSelf.description: Per-node responsive sizing. constraints {horizontal,vertical} for absolute children; layoutSizingHorizontal/Vertical (FIXED|HUG|FILL), layoutGrow, layoutAlign, min/maxWidth/Height for auto-layout participants.

text.description: TEXT nodes. Node-level fields plus, at phase >= 2, `segments` (per-range styling from getStyledTextSegments so bold/colored/sized runs survive) and `fontWeight`.

geometry.description: Vector shapes (VECTOR/BOOLEAN_OPERATION/LINE/POLYGON/STAR): fillGeometry/strokeGeometry are SVG path lists [{windingRule,data}] re-emittable as <path d>. booleanOperation on BOOLEAN_OPERATION nodes.

styleRefs.description: phase >= 2: fillStyleId/strokeStyleId/effectStyleId references (IDs only; the styles themselves are not serialized).

component.description: phase 3: INSTANCE variant/component properties + mainComponent ref; COMPONENT/COMPONENT_SET property definitions.
